projects.label: Our Work
projects.title: Built by us,
projects.subtitle: We don't just build for clients — we ship our own products too. TUT CARE is a live app made by the Tut Wonders team, solving real problems for real people.

tutcare.tagline: Care that goes wherever you do
tutcare.desc: TUT CARE helps visually impaired users and people with mobility challenges live more independently. It combines AI-powered text-to-speech document reading with an on-demand human helper network — connecting users to nearby verified helpers for safe, real-time assisted mobility. Available on iOS & Android, serving 12+ cities across Egypt.

tutcarePage.aboutExtra: Launched and maintained entirely by the Tut Wonders team, TUT CARE grew from a belief that technology should serve everyone — regardless of physical ability. Today it connects thousands of users with verified local helpers across Egypt, and continues to expand.
tutcarePage.featuresTitle: Everything you need, nothing you don't

features.title: AI Text-to-Speech
features.desc: Snap a photo of any document or sign and hear it read aloud in seconds — powered by on-device AI for speed and privacy.

features.title: On-Demand Helpers
features.desc: Request a nearby verified helper in real time. Track their location, read reviews, and pay securely — all inside the app.

features.title: Real-Time GPS Navigation
features.desc: Turn-by-turn audio guidance optimised for pedestrian routes, with live helper tracking on a shared map.

features.title: Document Scanner
features.desc: Full document scanning with auto-crop, contrast enhancement, and export — ideal for forms, prescriptions, and letters.

features.title: Background-Checked Network
features.desc: Every helper is verified, rated, and reviewed. Safety is built into every layer of the matching and payment process.

features.title: In-App Secure Payments
features.desc: Pay for helper sessions directly in the app with multiple payment methods. No cash handling, no friction.

tutcarePage.ctaSubtitle: Available on iOS and Android. Free to download.

tutcare.heroSubtitle: An AI-powered accessibility platform that gives blind users, people with low vision, and individuals with disabilities the tools to navigate the world independently — through intelligent voice interaction, real-time recognition, and a trusted helper network.
tutcare.aboutSubtitle: TutCare is an AI-powered mobile accessibility platform developed by TutWonders. Its mission is to give people with visual impairments and disabilities genuine independence — not a simplified version of someone else's experience, but real, confident access to the world as it is.
tutcare.missionText: TutCare exists to close the gap between assistive technology and lived reality. Most accessibility tools are designed as afterthoughts — built by teams who have never navigated a world without sight. We build differently, with the people we serve at the center of every decision.
tutcare.visionText: A world where disability is never a barrier to technology. We envision AI that adapts to every person — not the other way around. TutCare is our first step toward making intelligent, empathetic software the standard, not the exception.
tutcare.problemSubtitle: Over one billion people worldwide live with some form of disability. For many, the digital tools meant to help them are incomplete, hard to use, or simply absent.
tutcare.problem1Desc: Standard smartphones were not designed for zero-vision use. Reading text in the environment — menus, product labels, street signs, official documents — requires constant help from others or expensive dedicated hardware most people cannot access.
tutcare.problem1Solution: TutCare addresses this with OCR, object recognition & AI voice guidance
tutcare.problem2Desc: Low vision users fall between two worlds — they have some sight, but not enough for standard interfaces. Most apps offer only full accessibility or none at all. There is rarely a middle ground that adapts to the full spectrum of visual ability.
tutcare.problem2Solution: TutCare adapts dynamically to every level of visual capability
tutcare.problem3Desc: Motor impairments, cognitive differences, and other disabilities make touch-based interfaces exhausting or impossible. Voice control exists but is rarely built with accessibility as the primary use case — it is usually a convenience feature, not a foundation.
tutcare.problem3Solution: TutCare is voice-first, designed for hands-free complete control
tutcare.featuresSubtitle: Every feature in TutCare was shaped by direct feedback from blind users, accessibility experts, and disability advocates — not by assumptions.

features.title: AI Assistance
features.desc: A context-aware AI assistant that understands your environment, answers questions, and guides you through tasks using natural voice interaction.

features.title: Voice Navigation
features.desc: Hands-free, voice-driven control of the entire app. Navigate menus, trigger actions, and interact with content without ever touching the screen.

features.title: OCR & Text Recognition
features.desc: Instantly read printed text from documents, signs, labels, and screens — turning the visual world into accessible, spoken information.

features.title: Object Recognition
features.desc: Real-time identification of objects, people, colors, and surroundings through the camera, described clearly and immediately in audio.

features.title: Accessibility Tools
features.desc: A dedicated suite of assistive features including magnification, high-contrast modes, screen reader integration, and customizable audio cues.

features.title: Privacy & Security
features.desc: All on-device processing by default. Your data never leaves your phone unless you choose to share it, keeping your interactions fully private.

features.title: Fast Performance
features.desc: Engineered for near-instant response times so that every interaction feels seamless, even on low-end devices and limited connectivity.

features.title: Easy User Experience
features.desc: Designed from the ground up with accessibility specialists and real users, ensuring the interface is intuitive regardless of ability or technical background.

tutcare.howSubtitle: TutCare removes complexity from every step. Whether you are using the app for assistance or volunteering to help others, the process is clear, fast, and accessible.

userSteps.title: Download & Set Up
userSteps.desc: Install TutCare from the App Store or Google Play and complete a brief, fully guided voice-assisted onboarding in under two minutes.

userSteps.title: Speak Your Need
userSteps.desc: Simply say what you need — read this label, describe my surroundings, or find a nearby helper — and TutCare responds immediately.

userSteps.title: Get Instant Clarity
userSteps.desc: Receive clear, spoken feedback from the AI engine or connect with a live verified helper for real-time visual assistance.

helperSteps.title: Register as a Helper
helperSteps.desc: Sign up, verify your identity, and set your availability. The process takes minutes and requires no special equipment.

helperSteps.title: Receive a Request
helperSteps.desc: Get notified when a nearby user needs assistance. Accept the request and join a secure live session with a single tap.

helperSteps.title: Make a Difference
helperSteps.desc: Guide users through their environment, read information aloud, or describe what you see — earning recognition and impact with every session.

tutcare.techSubtitle: TutCare is built on proven, production-grade technologies selected for performance, security, and offline resilience.

techStack.title: React Native
techStack.desc: Cross-platform mobile framework powering the iOS and Android apps from a unified codebase.

techStack.title: TensorFlow Lite
techStack.desc: On-device machine learning for real-time object recognition and OCR without cloud dependency.

techStack.title: Claude AI
techStack.desc: Anthropic's Claude model provides the conversational AI assistant, context understanding, and natural language responses.

techStack.title: WebRTC
techStack.desc: Peer-to-peer encrypted video and audio for the live helper session network.

techStack.title: Node.js
techStack.desc: Lightweight, high-performance backend API handling authentication, session management, and helper matching.

techStack.title: Firebase
techStack.desc: Real-time database and push notifications that keep users and helpers connected with minimal latency.

reviews.text: TutCare has genuinely changed how I move through the world. The object recognition is fast, accurate, and the voice is natural — it feels like having a knowledgeable companion beside me.
reviews.name: Ahmed R.

reviews.text: I have low vision and struggled with most accessibility apps. TutCare is the first one that actually understands context. The OCR feature reads handwritten notes, labels, even street signs.
reviews.name: Nour H.

reviews.text: As an occupational therapist, I recommend TutCare to my patients. The helper network is thoughtfully designed — helpers are verified and the sessions feel safe and dignified.
reviews.name: Dr. Layla M.

reviews.text: The onboarding alone sets TutCare apart. Within five minutes of downloading, my grandfather — who has never used a smartphone — was navigating independently with voice commands.
reviews.name: Karim S.

reviews.text: I volunteered as a helper and the experience is seamless. The session interface is clear, the user requests are specific, and I always feel like my time is making a direct impact.
reviews.name: Sara T.

reviews.text: TutCare respects privacy in a way no other accessibility tool does. On-device AI processing is not a marketing claim here — it is how the app actually works by default.
reviews.name: Omar F.

tutcare.pricingSubtitle: TutCare's core features are free, forever. Upgrade for unlimited AI, live helper sessions, and advanced privacy controls.

plans.name: Free
plans.desc: Core accessibility tools for everyday independent use.

plans.name: Pro
plans.desc: Full AI power and unlimited access for active users.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: Custom deployment for organizations, schools, and institutions.

faqs.a: TutCare is built for blind users, people with low vision, and anyone with a physical or cognitive disability that makes standard smartphone interfaces difficult to use. It is also used by caregivers, helpers, and organizations that support people with disabilities.

faqs.q: Does TutCare require an internet connection?
faqs.a: Core features such as voice navigation and basic object recognition work offline. Advanced AI assistance and live helper sessions require an active connection. Pro subscribers get an expanded offline mode.
All helpers go through an identity verification process before being approved. Sessions are encrypted end-to-end and users can rate every interaction, maintaining a trusted, accountable community.

Yes. TutCare supports Arabic with full right-to-left layout, Arabic voice recognition, and natural Arabic text-to-speech — making it fully accessible to Arabic-speaking users across the Middle East and North Africa.
TutCare is available on iOS and Android. A web companion tool for organizations and caregivers is currently in development.
TutCare is developed and maintained by TutWonders, a digital innovation studio specializing in AI-powered software and accessible technology solutions.

tutcare.ctaSubtitle: TutCare is currently in final development. Join the waitlist or check back soon to be among the first to experience it on iOS and Android.
tutcare.ctaNote: TutCare is a TutWonders product — built with care, designed for everyone.
tutcare.footerDesc: Community care & assistance app — coming soon
